summary: First-finish smoke test of Yachi Darji portfolio (backend + frontend). Backend contact API works with EmailStr validation. All frontend hero, nav, projects filter+cards+achievement, architecture explorer (5 nodes), timeline (5 years), terminal (button + backtick + commands help/whoami/projects showing CatSense/clear/sudo hire yachi), Command Palette (Cmd+K + Escape), and contact form submit (success toast 'message.transmitted' + achievement 'Project details opened') all pass with no console errors.
passed: POST /api/contact valid payload -> 200 with created object (id, timestamp)
POST /api/contact invalid email -> 422 EmailStr validation error
Homepage loads, no console/page errors, hero-name='Yachi Darji.', system-status-panel visible, hero-cta-work + hero-cta-resume visible
Projects filters (all/live/genai/research) toggle; 5 project cards render (project-rentpilot, etc.); clicking card triggers achievement toast 'Project details opened · 1/7 discovered'
Terminal opens via floating $ TERMINAL button; commands help/whoami/projects/clear work; 'projects' output contains 'CatSense'; 'sudo hire yachi' closes terminal
Terminal opens via backtick key when body has focus
Command Palette opens via Cmd+K, palette-input accepts input, closes on Escape
Contact form submits successfully - Sonner toast 'message.transmitted' displayed and record persisted (verified via curl also)
notes: Only minor observation: project card testids are `project-{id}` (e.g., project-rentpilot) rather than `project-card-{id}` — not a bug, just noting for downstream tests. Achievement toast system verified. No mocked APIs. CORS OK from public URL.
